rationale: The cited paper is used mainly as a background reference: once in a grouped list of prior platform research topics (resource allocation) and once as a general example that platforms can use advertising to grow. The citing paper does not rely on Sridhar et al. (2011) for its principal-agent model, compensation design, assumptions, or empirical/methodological setup. There is no paper-specific extension, refinement, or challenge tied to that work.
